activities.instructions: Complete the sentence with the past continuous form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: At eight o'clock, we ___ outside the theatre. (wait)
activities.explanation: La espera estaba en progreso a una hora concreta: «were waiting».

activities.instructions: Complete the sentence with the past simple form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: The meeting ___ at 4.15 and everyone left. (end)
activities.explanation: El final de la reunión es un evento completo.

activities.instructions: Complete the sentence using all the cues in brackets.
activities.prompt: ___. (I/cycle home / when / I/see the accident)

evaluator.answer: I was cycling home when I saw the accident

activities.explanation: La bicicleta estaba en movimiento; «saw» introduce el evento que ocurrió.

activities.instructions: Complete the sentence with the past continuous form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: While I was cooking, Leo ___ the table. (set)
activities.explanation: Las dos acciones estaban en progreso al mismo tiempo.

activities.instructions: Complete the sentence with the natural past form of the stative verb.
activities.prompt: I ___ the answer, but I stayed quiet. (know)
activities.explanation: «Know» expresa un estado y usa past simple «knew».

activities.instructions: Complete the sentence with the negative past continuous form.
activities.prompt: We ___ any visitors, so the knock surprised us. (not/expect)
activities.explanation: El sujeto plural usa «weren't expecting».

activities.instructions: Complete the past continuous question using the cues.
activities.prompt: ___ when the alarm went off? (Maya/sleep)
activities.explanation: La pregunta se forma con «Was + sujeto + -ing».

activities.instructions: Complete the sentence with the past simple form.
activities.prompt: The lights suddenly ___ while we were having dinner. (go out)
activities.explanation: El apagón es el evento completo que interrumpe la cena.

activities.instructions: Complete the sentence with the past continuous form.
activities.prompt: The children ___ around the track when the whistle blew. (run)
activities.explanation: «Run» duplica la consonante final: «were running».

activities.instructions: Complete the sequence using all the cues in brackets.
activities.prompt: ___. (I/save the file / close the laptop / leave the office)

evaluator.answer: I saved the file, closed the laptop and left the office

activities.explanation: Los eventos sucesivos completos usan past simple.

activities.instructions: Complete the sentence with the form that presents a temporary background.
activities.prompt: I met Jo during a summer placement while I ___ in Madrid. (work)
activities.explanation: El trabajo temporal sirve como fondo para el encuentro.

activities.instructions: Complete the sentence with the form that presents a completed period.
activities.prompt: I ___ near the coast from 2018 to 2020, then I moved inland. (live)
activities.explanation: Las fechas delimitan un periodo terminado.

activities.instructions: Complete the sentence with the form that expresses an opinion.
activities.prompt: I ___ the plan was too risky. (think)
activities.explanation: «Think» como opinión usa past simple «thought».

activities.instructions: Complete the sentence with the form that expresses an ongoing mental process.
activities.prompt: I ___ about changing the route when you called. (think)
activities.explanation: «Think about» describe un proceso en curso interrumpido por la llamada.

activities.instructions: Complete the sentence using both background verbs.
activities.prompt: As the shops closed, ___. (rain/fall; people/hurry home)

evaluator.answer: rain was falling and people were hurrying home

activities.explanation: Las dos acciones estaban en progreso y crean el escenario.

activities.instructions: Complete the sentence with the form that describes a deliberate action in progress.
activities.prompt: The chef ___ the sauce when the alarm sounded. (taste)
activities.explanation: El chef realizaba la acción de probar la salsa en ese momento.

activities.instructions: Complete the sentence with the form that describes a property.
activities.prompt: The sauce ___ unusually bitter, so we did not serve it. (taste)
activities.explanation: Aquí «taste» expresa una propiedad y usa past simple.

activities.instructions: Complete the sentence with the form that presents a long period as complete.
activities.prompt: She ___ in Nairobi for five years before moving to Accra. (work)
activities.explanation: La duración es larga, pero el periodo está terminado.

activities.instructions: Complete the sentence with the form that describes repeated activity in progress.
activities.prompt: The warning light ___ continuously, so I switched the machine off. (flash)
activities.explanation: El destello repetido estaba en progreso antes de apagar la máquina.

activities.instructions: Complete the sentence using «always» to emphasize an irritating repeated habit.
activities.prompt: He ___ my charger without asking, which annoyed me. (always/borrow)
activities.explanation: El continuo con «always» enfatiza la repetición molesta.

activities.instructions: Complete the sentence using all the cues in brackets.
activities.prompt: ___. (while one group/collect samples / other/record data / then supervisor/check results)

evaluator.answer: While one group was collecting samples, the other was recording the data; then the supervisor checked the results

activities.explanation: Las primeras tareas eran paralelas; la revisión fue posterior y completa.

activities.instructions: Complete the account using all three verbs in brackets.
activities.prompt: ___. (we/follow the route; GPS/stop working; we/use a paper map)

evaluator.answer: We were following the route when the GPS stopped working, so we used a paper map

activities.explanation: La ruta era el fondo; el fallo y la reacción fueron eventos completos.

activities.instructions: Complete the sentence using all the cues in brackets.
activities.prompt: ___. (I/believe figures were wrong / while analyst/check them again)

evaluator.answer: I believed the figures were wrong while the analyst was checking them again

activities.explanation: «Believe» expresa estado; «check» describe la actividad en progreso.

activities.instructions: Complete the sentence using all the cues in brackets.
activities.prompt: ___. (when inspector/arrive / technicians/run final safety test)

evaluator.answer: When the inspector arrived, the technicians were running the final safety test

activities.explanation: La llegada ocurrió durante una prueba que ya estaba en progreso.

activities.instructions: Complete the account using all three verbs in brackets.
activities.prompt: ___. (wind/blow harder; we/cross the ridge; it/stop at the shelter)

evaluator.answer: The wind was blowing harder as we were crossing the ridge, but it stopped at the shelter

activities.explanation: Las dos primeras acciones forman el fondo; «stopped» marca el cambio completo.
